name: Original 12 Surviving Castles
description: Japan's 12 surviving wooden keeps that have endured unaltered since the Edo period or earlier.

name: UNESCO World Heritage Japan
description: Cultural and natural sites designated by UNESCO for their outstanding universal value.

name: Top 100 Castles of Japan
description: Certified premier castles selected by the Japan Castle Foundation for architectural and historical significance.

name: Three Great Gardens of Japan
description: Japan's three most celebrated traditional landscape gardens (Kenroku-en, Kairaku-en, Koraku-en).
